warmup_steps = min(max(8, total_steps // 10), max(0, total_steps - 1))\\n    if warmup_steps == 0:\\n        return optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=total_steps)\\n    warmup = optim.lr_scheduler.LinearLR(optimizer, start_factor=0.2, total_iters=warmup_steps)\\n    cosine = optim.lr_scheduler.CosineAnnealingLR(optimizer, T_max=max(1, total_steps - warmup_steps))\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.SequentialLR(optimizer, schedulers=[warmup, cosine], milestones=[warmup_steps])\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Use the fixed 256-step budget more effectively with AdamW at a higher learning rate plus a short warmup and cosine decay; this is a compact, high-upside optimization change that should improve early-budget convergence without altering model complexity.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"topk\"]}"}}
